who: HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month
offer: For HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month, unmonitored overtime causes compliance issues. We alert HR when overtime exceeds limits instead of manual tracking of timesheets and overtime calculations.
problem: Overtime management and compliance with labor laws
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR operations with demo video
Contribute to community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of timesheets and alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for alerts
Allow CSV import for existing timesheet data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
